title: Foundation Flow
description: Beginner Muay Thai session focused on technique quality and movement.

title: Teep And Punch
description: Beginner Muay Thai session focused on technique quality and movement.

title: Kick Starter
description: Beginner Muay Thai session focused on technique quality and movement.

title: Defense Builder
description: Beginner Muay Thai session focused on technique quality and movement.

title: First Clinch Skills
description: Beginner Muay Thai session focused on technique quality and movement.

title: Pressure Boxing
description: Intermediate Muay Thai session focused on combinations, timing, and technical volume.

title: Kick Chain Builder
description: Intermediate Muay Thai session focused on combinations, timing, and technical volume.

title: Counter Fighter
description: Intermediate Muay Thai session focused on combinations, timing, and technical volume.

title: Clinch Control
description: Intermediate Muay Thai session focused on combinations, timing, and technical volume.

title: Footwork And Angles
description: Intermediate Muay Thai session focused on combinations, timing, and technical volume.

title: Pro Pressure Chains
description: Advanced Muay Thai session built around high-pressure striking chains and sharp exits.

exercises.title: Switch Pivot Entry
exercises.description: Switch stance, pivot, and step back into fight position.

exercises.title: Angle Guard Steps
exercises.description: Step left and right with high guard and quick stance recovery.
exercises.help: Keep your feet under your hips.

exercises.title: Double Jab Cross
exercises.description: Use two jabs to set up a hard rear cross.
exercises.help: Touch first, drive the cross second.

exercises.title: Cross Hook Body Kick
exercises.description: Throw cross and hook, then finish with a rear body kick.
exercises.help: Let the hook load the kick.

exercises.title: Teep Cross Elbow
exercises.description: Push with the teep, step in with cross, and cut with diagonal elbow.
exercises.help: Close distance only after balance returns.

exercises.title: Jab Uppercut Hook Kick
exercises.description: Blend jab, uppercut, hook, and rear round kick.

exercises.title: Check Hook Kick
exercises.description: Check the kick, return with hook, and finish with leg kick.

exercises.title: Slip Cross Knee
exercises.description: Slip off line, fire cross, then drive a straight knee.
exercises.help: Move your head before your counter.

exercises.title: Elbow Knee Exit
exercises.description: Throw horizontal elbow, straight knee, then exit with guard.

exercises.title: Clinch Turn Triple Knee
exercises.description: Simulate a clinch turn and throw three strong knees.
exercises.help: Turn first, then knee with posture.

exercises.title: Catch Kick Sweep Step
exercises.description: Catch the kick, step across, and simulate off-balancing.
exercises.help: Control before you move the opponent.

exercises.title: Four Strike Surge
exercises.description: Throw jab, cross, hook, and head kick as one fast sequence.

title: Pro Counter Lab
description: Advanced defensive workout focused on checks, slips, catches, and immediate counters.

exercises.title: Reactive Guard Steps
exercises.description: Move forward and backward while snapping back to high guard.
exercises.help: Guard returns before your feet stop.

exercises.title: Slip Pivot Reset
exercises.description: Slip to each side, pivot, and recover stance.

exercises.title: Parry Jab Cross
exercises.description: Parry the lead hand and answer with jab-cross.

exercises.title: Lean Back Teep
exercises.description: Lean back from a kick line and return with lead teep.

exercises.title: Check Cross Body Kick
exercises.description: Check, return cross, and finish with body kick.

exercises.title: Catch Cross Hook
exercises.description: Catch the kick and answer with cross-hook.

exercises.title: Block Elbow Knee
exercises.description: Block high, step in with elbow, then throw a straight knee.

exercises.title: Slip Hook Low Kick
exercises.description: Slip outside, throw lead hook, and finish with leg kick.

exercises.title: Parry Cross Head Kick
exercises.description: Parry, fire cross, and finish high with a round kick.

exercises.title: Frame Knee Escape
exercises.description: Frame from close range, knee, then step out.

exercises.title: Check Elbow Return
exercises.description: Check the kick, step down, and cut with horizontal elbow.

exercises.title: Defense Flow Finish
exercises.description: Check, cross, hook, and rear round kick in one flow.

title: Pro Clinch Damage
description: Advanced clinch session combining posture control, turns, knees, elbows, and exits.

exercises.title: Posture Step Drill
exercises.description: Step in and out with tall clinch posture.

exercises.title: Inside Frame Walk
exercises.description: Build inside position while stepping left and right.

exercises.title: Collar Tie Knee
exercises.description: Simulate collar tie control and drive a straight knee.
exercises.help: Pull down as the knee rises.

exercises.title: Turn Knee Reset
exercises.description: Turn the opponent, knee once, and reset posture.

exercises.title: Frame Elbow Exit
exercises.description: Frame, throw diagonal elbow, and exit to guard.
exercises.help: Elbow on the break, not from far away.

exercises.title: Curved Knee Chain
exercises.description: Throw alternating curved knees from close range.

exercises.title: Off Balance Knee
exercises.description: Pull, step, and knee after disrupting balance.

exercises.title: Elbow Knee Elbow
exercises.description: Throw horizontal elbow, straight knee, and upward elbow.

exercises.title: Clinch Turn Kick
exercises.description: Turn out of clinch and finish with body kick.

exercises.title: Triple Knee Exit
exercises.description: Throw three clinch knees and step out with guard.
exercises.help: Do not drop posture between knees.

exercises.title: Frame Teep Reset
exercises.description: Frame, step out, and use rear teep to reset distance.

exercises.title: Close Range Finish
exercises.description: Throw elbow, knee, hook, and round kick after exiting.

title: Pro Kick Arsenal
description: Advanced kicking workout for teep control, low kicks, body kicks, and high-kick setups.

exercises.title: Kick Stance Switches
exercises.description: Switch stance and reset into kicking range.

exercises.title: Pivot Hip Opens
exercises.description: Pivot repeatedly to prepare round kick mechanics.

exercises.title: Lead Teep Rear Kick
exercises.description: Lead teep to create space, then rear body kick.

exercises.title: Jab Low Kick
exercises.description: Use the jab to hide a rear leg kick.

exercises.title: Cross Hook Head Kick
exercises.description: Punch high and finish with a controlled head kick.
exercises.help: Hands return before the kick rises.

exercises.title: Teep Fake Cross Kick
exercises.description: Fake a teep, throw cross, then rear round kick.
exercises.help: Sell the fake with your hip.

exercises.title: Check Return Low Kick
exercises.description: Check, step down, and return a low kick.

exercises.title: Body Kick Knee
exercises.description: Throw body kick, step down, and drive straight knee.

exercises.title: Side Teep Cross Hook
exercises.description: Side teep, cross, and hook as a distance-breaking combo.
exercises.help: Keep the teep long and the punches compact.

exercises.title: Double Kick Flow
exercises.description: Throw leg kick then body kick with clean reset.
exercises.help: Do not rush the second kick.

exercises.title: Catch Kick Return
exercises.description: Catch the kick and return a rear round kick.

exercises.title: Kick Storm Finish
exercises.description: Throw teep, cross, hook, and body kick at fight pace.

title: Pro Fight Pace
description: Advanced conditioning-style Muay Thai workout using realistic fight combinations and defensive returns.

exercises.title: Fast Guard March
exercises.description: March forward and backward in stance with high guard.

exercises.title: Angle Switch Burst
exercises.description: Switch stance, angle step, and reset quickly.

exercises.title: Punch Volume Burst
exercises.description: Throw jab, cross, hook, and uppercut in sequence.

exercises.title: Teep Jab Cross
exercises.description: Use teep to disrupt, then attack with jab-cross.

exercises.title: Hook Cross Body Kick
exercises.description: Throw hook, cross, and rear body kick.

exercises.title: Check Counter Burst
exercises.description: Check, cross, hook, and leg kick.
exercises.help: Return fire as soon as you land.

exercises.title: Elbow Flurry Knee
exercises.description: Throw horizontal elbow, upward elbow, and straight knee.

exercises.title: Slip Punch Kick
exercises.description: Slip, cross, hook, and head kick with control.

exercises.title: Clinch Knee Burn
exercises.description: Drive repeated clinch knees from tall posture.

exercises.title: Frame Exit Kick
exercises.description: Frame, exit, and fire a rear body kick.

exercises.title: Four Weapon Combo
exercises.description: Use punch, elbow, knee, and kick in one sequence.

exercises.title: Final Fight Chain
exercises.description: Throw teep, cross, hook, knee, and round kick as a hard finish.
